title: Privacy policy
seoDescription: Privacy policy of Instal Berrozpe S.L. for enquiries received by form, email, phone or WhatsApp.
intro: This policy explains how Instal Berrozpe S.L. handles personal data received through this website and its contact channels.

sections.heading: Data controller
body: Legal and tax address: Antiga 68 bajos de Blanes. Public reference address: Carrer de l'Antiga, 68, 17300 Blanes, Girona, Spain.

sections.heading: Purpose and legal basis
body: Data is used to handle enquiries received by form, email, phone or WhatsApp, to answer questions and to manage the contact requested by the user.
The legal basis is the user's consent when sending an enquiry and Instal Berrozpe's legitimate interest in answering requests related to its professional activity.
Data will not be used for purposes other than those described here and will not be sold to third parties.

sections.heading: Retention and recipients
body: Data will be kept for as long as necessary to handle the enquiry and for any additional period required by applicable law.
As a general rule, data will not be disclosed to third parties unless there is a legal obligation or it is necessary for the technical operation of the service.

sections.heading: Your rights
body: You may request access, rectification, deletion, objection, restriction of processing and data portability where applicable.
To exercise these rights, write to david@instalberrozpe.com and explain your request together with the information needed to identify you.
